entities.name: WOMEN
entities.description: Demographic group playing a key role in agricultural production and highly vulnerable to the consequences of climate change

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The organization and process of producing food and crops for households

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental condition causing vulnerability and impacts that need to be addressed through leadership and management

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, which conducts research for development projects

entities.name: RESEARCH FOR DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: A research approach (R4D) used by ICRISAT to provide insights into the inclusion and empowerment of women

entities.name: INCLUSION AND EMPOWERMENT
entities.description: The process of integrating women into physical and social environments to improve their self-worth and role

entities.name: ECONOMIC BENEFITS
entities.description: Tangible financial gains that are important for bringing women's perspectives into projects

entities.name: LOCAL ECONOMIES
entities.description: Regional economic systems managed through users' perspectives

entities.name: SOCIAL NETWORKS
entities.description: Interpersonal connections managed through users' perspectives

entities.name: VILLAGE AND ORGANIZATIONAL LEADERSHIP
entities.description: Leadership roles in which women's participation makes a difference in addressing climate change

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The management of means of living in which women's participation makes a difference in addressing climate change

entities.name: KNOWLEDGE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The management of information and expertise in which women's participation makes a difference in addressing climate change

entities.name: SOCIAL CONSTRUCTION AND NEGOTIATION
entities.description: An active process required for designing interventions for women, avoiding simple linear patterns
